CREATE TABLE ellipses (x0 FLOAT, y0 FLOAT, a FLOAT, b FLOAT);
SELECT count() FROM ellipses WHERE pointInEllipses(6., 6., x0, y0, a, b) = 1;
CREATE TABLE results AS SELECT pointInEllipses(10., 10., x0, y0, a, b) AS is_inside FROM ellipses;
SELECT pointInEllipses(10., 10., x0, y0, a, b) FROM ellipses HAVING x0 >= 0 AND y0 >= 0;
WITH (SELECT x0, y0, a, b FROM ellipses) AS e SELECT pointInEllipses(6., 6., e.x0, e.y0, e.a, e.b) FROM e;
